  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' centers on sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without changing the substance.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should retain appropriate hedging and avoid removing qualifiers that communicate uncertainty.",
    "RX.2": "Polishing must not strengthen claims beyond what the reported evidence and metrics support.",
    "RX.3": "The scope is limited to wording improvements and excludes restructuring, reframing, or analytical changes.",
    "RX.4": "Careful language is needed to avoid creating misleading impressions in safety-sensitive contexts mentioned in the text.",
    "RX.5": "All original metrics, claims, and attributions should be preserved with changes traceable to the source text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' centers on sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without changing the substance.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should retain appropriate hedging and avoid removing qualifiers that communicate uncertainty.
rationale.RX.2: Polishing must not strengthen claims beyond what the reported evidence and metrics support.
rationale.RX.3: The scope is limited to wording improvements and excludes restructuring, reframing, or analytical changes.
rationale.RX.4: Careful language is needed to avoid creating misleading impressions in safety-sensitive contexts mentioned in the text.
rationale.RX.5: All original metrics, claims, and attributions should be preserved with changes traceable to the source text.
